title: The Telephone
content:
To-night in million-voiced London I
    Was lonely as the million-pointed sky
    Until your single voice. Ah! So the sun
    Peoples all heaven, although he be but one.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The Telephone", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
